{"theorem": "common_divisor_dvd_difference",
 "statements": [
   {"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "",
    "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "b",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "common divisor",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides",
    "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "univ", "force": "demand", "quote": "A common divisor of a and b divides their difference a minus b",
    "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "d"]}},
   {"id": "common", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "common divisor of a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "and", "args": [
      {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]},
      {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}},
   {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "divides their difference a minus b",
    "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [
      {"ref": "d"},
      {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}
 ]}

{"theorem": "factor_dvd_sub", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "oa", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "ob", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "od", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "factor", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "factor", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "qf", "force": "demand", "quote": "Any factor shared by a and b", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "d"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "Any factor shared by a and b is also a factor of a minus b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "implies", "args": [{"op": "and", "args": [{"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_sub", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "g", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "g is a divisor", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "g", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "of a", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "of b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divisor", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "all", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "When", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["g", "a", "b"]}}, {"id": "h1", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "g is a divisor of a", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "g"}, {"ref": "a"}]}}}, {"id": "h2", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "as well as of b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "g"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "g divides a minus b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "g"}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_sub", "statements": [{"id": "amb1", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "o_d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "Something", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "o_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "o_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "q1", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "Something", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["d", "a", "b"]}}, {"id": "h1", "force": "demand", "quote": "divides both a and b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "and", "args": [{"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}, {"id": "c1", "force": "demand", "quote": "divide a minus b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem":"dvd_sub","statements":[{"id":"s1","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"ambient","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"s2","force":"presupposition","quote":"A number","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"n","type":"Int"}},{"id":"s3","force":"presupposition","quote":"a","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"a","type":"Int"}},{"id":"s4","force":"presupposition","quote":"b","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"b","type":"Int"}},{"id":"s5","force":"presupposition","quote":"divides","lf":{"kind":"operator","word":"dvd","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"s6","force":"demand","quote":"A number","lf":{"kind":"quantifier","binder":"forall","objects":["n","a","b"]}},{"id":"s7","force":"demand","quote":"divides a and also divides b will divide a minus b","lf":{"kind":"conclusion","pred":{"op":"implies","args":[{"op":"and","args":[{"op":"dvd","args":[{"ref":"n"},{"ref":"a"}]},{"op":"dvd","args":[{"ref":"n"},{"ref":"b"}]}]},{"op":"dvd","args":[{"ref":"n"},{"op":"-","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"b"}]}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "common_divisor_divides_difference",
 "statements": [
   {"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "",
    "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "the pair a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "the pair a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "obj_d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "Every common divisor",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides",
    "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "quant", "force": "demand", "quote": "Every common divisor of the pair a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "d"]}},
   {"id": "hyp_da", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "common divisor of the pair a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]}}},
   {"id": "hyp_db", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "common divisor of the pair a and b",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}},
   {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "divides a minus b",
    "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}
 ]}

{"theorem": "every_integer_divides_itself", "statements": [{"id": "carrier", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "n", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "dvd_op", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "univ", "force": "demand", "quote": "Every integer n", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "divides itself", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "one_dvd_every_int", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "n", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integer n", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "all_n", "force": "demand", "quote": "every integer n", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The integer 1 divides every integer n", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"lit": 1}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_trans", "statements": [{"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and c are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and c are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_c", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and c are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "c", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "amb_int", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and c are integers", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "c"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "If a divides b and b divides c, then a divides c", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "implies", "args": [{"op": "and", "args": [{"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "b"}, {"ref": "c"}]}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "c"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "sum_of_two_even_integers_is_even",
 "statements": [
   {"id": "a", "force": "demand", "quote": "two even integers",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "b", "force": "demand", "quote": "two even integers",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "op_even", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "even",
    "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "even", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "quant", "force": "demand", "quote": "two even integers",
    "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}},
   {"id": "hyp_a_even", "force": "demand", "quote": "even integers",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"ref": "a"}]}}},
   {"id": "hyp_b_even", "force": "demand", "quote": "even integers",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"ref": "b"}]}}},
   {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The sum of two even integers is even",
    "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"op": "+", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}
 ]}

{"theorem": "sum_two_odd_even", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "a", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "b", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "odd_op", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "odd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "even_op", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "even", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "demand", "quote": "two odd integers", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "hyp_a", "force": "demand", "quote": "odd", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}]}}}, {"id": "hyp_b", "force": "demand", "quote": "odd", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The sum of two odd integers is even", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"op": "+", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "odd_mul_odd", "statements": [{"id": "ambient", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_odd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "odd", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "odd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "two", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "hyp_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "two odd integers", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}]}}}, {"id": "hyp_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "two odd integers", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The product of two odd integers is odd", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{
  "theorem": "even_add_odd_is_odd",
  "statements": [
    {"id": "m", "force": "demand", "quote": "an even integer",
     "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "m", "type": "Int"}},
    {"id": "n", "force": "demand", "quote": "an odd integer",
     "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}},
    {"id": "op_even", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "even",
     "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "even", "carrier": "Int"}},
    {"id": "op_odd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "odd",
     "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "odd", "carrier": "Int"}},
    {"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "",
     "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}},
    {"id": "quant", "force": "demand", "quote": "an even integer and an odd integer",
     "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["m", "n"]}},
    {"id": "hyp_even", "force": "demand", "quote": "an even integer",
     "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"ref": "m"}]}}},
    {"id": "hyp_odd", "force": "demand", "quote": "an odd integer",
     "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"ref": "n"}]}}},
    {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The sum of an even integer and an odd integer is odd",
     "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "odd", "args": [{"op": "+", "args": [{"ref": "m"}, {"ref": "n"}]}]}}}
  ]
}

{"theorem":"even_add_two","statements":[{"id":"obj_n","force":"presupposition","quote":"an integer n","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"n","type":"Int"}},{"id":"all_n","force":"presupposition","quote":"an integer n","lf":{"kind":"quantifier","binder":"forall","objects":["n"]}},{"id":"op_even","force":"presupposition","quote":"even","lf":{"kind":"operator","word":"even","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"hyp_even","force":"presupposition","quote":"n is even","lf":{"kind":"hypothesis","pred":{"op":"even","args":[{"ref":"n"}]}}},{"id":"concl_even","force":"demand","quote":"n plus 2 is even","lf":{"kind":"conclusion","pred":{"op":"even","args":[{"op":"+","args":[{"ref":"n"},{"lit":2}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "int_dvd_mul", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers a and b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers a and b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "demand", "quote": "For all integers a and b", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "a divides the product a times b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "gcd_self_eq", "statements": [{"id": "s1", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s2", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "n is a nonnegative integer", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s3", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "greatest common divisor", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "gcd", "carrier": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s4", "force": "demand", "quote": "The greatest common divisor of n and n equals n", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"op": "gcd", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"ref": "n"}]}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem":"int_congruence_reflexive","statements":[{"id":"s0","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"ambient","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"s1","force":"presupposition","quote":"m is a positive integer","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"m","type":"Int"}},{"id":"s2","force":"presupposition","quote":"positive integer","lf":{"kind":"hypothesis","pred":{"op":"<","args":[{"lit":0},{"ref":"m"}]}}},{"id":"s3","force":"demand","quote":"Every integer a","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"a","type":"Int"}},{"id":"s4","force":"presupposition","quote":"modulo m","lf":{"kind":"operator","word":"mod","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"s5","force":"demand","quote":"Every integer a","lf":{"kind":"quantifier","binder":"forall","objects":["a"]}},{"id":"s6","force":"demand","quote":"congruent to itself modulo m","lf":{"kind":"conclusion","pred":{"op":"=","args":[{"op":"mod","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"m"}]},{"op":"mod","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"m"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem":"congruence_symm","statements":[{"id":"amb","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"ambient","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"obj_a","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"a","type":"Int"}},{"id":"obj_b","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"b","type":"Int"}},{"id":"obj_m","force":"choice","quote":"","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"m","type":"Int"}},{"id":"op_mod","force":"presupposition","quote":"modulo","lf":{"kind":"operator","word":"mod","carrier":"Int"}},{"id":"hyp_pos","force":"presupposition","quote":"positive integer","lf":{"kind":"hypothesis","pred":{"op":"<","args":[{"lit":0},{"ref":"m"}]}}},{"id":"concl","force":"demand","quote":"If a is congruent to b modulo m, then b is congruent to a modulo m","lf":{"kind":"conclusion","pred":{"op":"implies","args":[{"op":"=","args":[{"op":"%","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"m"}]},{"op":"%","args":[{"ref":"b"},{"ref":"m"}]}]},{"op":"=","args":[{"op":"%","args":[{"ref":"b"},{"ref":"m"}]},{"op":"%","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"m"}]}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "every_integer_congruent_zero_mod_one", "statements": [{"id": "s1", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s2", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integer", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "s3", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "modulo", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "mod", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s4", "force": "demand", "quote": "Every integer", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "s5", "force": "demand", "quote": "congruent to 0 modulo 1", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"op": "mod", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"lit": 1}]}, {"lit": 0}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "even_product", "statements": [{"id": "a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "any integer", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "an even integer", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_even", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "even", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "even", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "q", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "any", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "hyp_even_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "even integer", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "The product of any integer with an even integer is even", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "even", "args": [{"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_mul_of_dvd", "statements": [{"id": "obj_a", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_c", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "c", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "hyp_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a divides b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "quant_c", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "for every integer c", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["c"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "a divides the product b times c", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "b"}, {"ref": "c"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "sq_nonneg", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "n", "force": "demand", "quote": "integer n", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "q", "force": "demand", "quote": "For every integer n", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "c", "force": "demand", "quote": "n squared is greater than or equal to 0", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<=", "args": [{"lit": 0}, {"op": "^", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"lit": 2}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem":"mul_right_cancel","statements":[{"id":"obj_a","force":"presupposition","quote":"a, b, and c are integers","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"a","type":"Int"}},{"id":"obj_b","force":"presupposition","quote":"a, b, and c are integers","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"b","type":"Int"}},{"id":"obj_c","force":"presupposition","quote":"a, b, and c are integers","lf":{"kind":"object","name":"c","type":"Int"}},{"id":"quant","force":"demand","quote":"If a times c equals b times c, then a equals b","lf":{"kind":"quantifier","binder":"forall","objects":["a","b","c"]}},{"id":"concl","force":"demand","quote":"If a times c equals b times c, then a equals b","lf":{"kind":"conclusion","pred":{"op":"implies","args":[{"op":"=","args":[{"op":"*","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"c"}]},{"op":"*","args":[{"ref":"b"},{"ref":"c"}]}]},{"op":"=","args":[{"ref":"a"},{"ref":"b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "mul_left_cancel", "statements": [{"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and k are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and k are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_k", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and k are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "k", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and k are integers", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "k"]}}, {"id": "hyp", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "k times a equals k times b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "k"}, {"ref": "a"}]}, {"op": "*", "args": [{"ref": "k"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "a equals b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "mod_lt", "statements": [{"id": "s1", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "s2", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "m", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "s3", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "modulo", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "mod", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s4", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "For all integers a and m", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "m"]}}, {"id": "s5", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s6", "force": "demand", "quote": "a modulo m is less than m", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<", "args": [{"op": "%", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "m"}]}, {"ref": "m"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "mod_le_m_sub_one",
 "statements": [
   {"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "",
    "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers a and m",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "m", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "integers a and m",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "m", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "op_mod", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "modulo",
    "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "mod", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "q", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "For all integers a and m",
    "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "m"]}},
   {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "a modulo m is at most m minus 1",
    "lf": {"kind": "conclusion",
           "pred": {"op": "<=", "args": [
             {"op": "%", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "m"}]},
             {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "m"}, {"lit": 1}]}
           ]}}}
 ]}

{"theorem": "gcd_greatest_common_divisor", "statements": [{"id": "s1", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s2", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "s3", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "s4", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "greatest common divisor", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "gcd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s5", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "s6", "force": "demand", "quote": "The greatest common divisor of a and b is the largest integer that divides both a and b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "and", "args": [{"op": "dvd", "args": [{"op": "gcd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}, {"ref": "a"}]}, {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"op": "gcd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "largest_divisor_is_self",
 "statements": [
   {"id": "s1", "force": "presupposition",
    "quote": "an integer n",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "s2", "force": "presupposition",
    "quote": "divisor",
    "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}},
   {"id": "s3", "force": "presupposition",
    "quote": "divisor",
    "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "s4", "force": "choice",
    "quote": "",
    "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}},
   {"id": "s5", "force": "presupposition",
    "quote": "largest divisor",
    "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "<", "args": [{"lit": 0}, {"ref": "n"}]}}},
   {"id": "s6", "force": "demand",
    "quote": "an integer n",
    "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n", "d"]}},
   {"id": "s7", "force": "demand",
    "quote": "The largest divisor of an integer n is n itself",
    "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "and", "args": [
      {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"ref": "n"}]},
      {"op": "implies", "args": [
        {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "n"}]},
        {"op": "<=", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "n"}]}
      ]}
    ]}}}
 ]}

{"theorem": "divisor_le_n", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "n", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "an integer n", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "Every divisor", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divisor of", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "pos", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "an integer n", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "<", "args": [{"lit": 0}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}, {"id": "all", "force": "demand", "quote": "Every divisor", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["d"]}}, {"id": "div", "force": "demand", "quote": "divisor of", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "is at most n", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<=", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "gcd_pos", "statements": [{"id": "s1", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s2", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s3", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s4", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "gcd", "carrier": "Nat"}}, {"id": "s5", "force": "demand", "quote": "The greatest common divisor of a and b is positive", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<", "args": [{"lit": 0}, {"op": "gcd", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "sub_one_lt_self", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "n", "force": "demand", "quote": "number n", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "q", "force": "demand", "quote": "For every number n", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "c", "force": "demand", "quote": "n minus 1 is less than n", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<", "args": [{"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "n"}, {"lit": 1}]}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "sub_add_cancel", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "b", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "For all numbers a and b", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "a minus b plus b equals a", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"op": "+", "args": [{"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}, {"ref": "b"}]}, {"ref": "a"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "pred_exists", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_n", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "number n", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "n", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_m", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a number m", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "m", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "all_n", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "For every number n", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["n"]}}, {"id": "ex_m", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "there is a number m", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "exists", "objects": ["m"]}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "m plus 1 equal to n", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "=", "args": [{"op": "+", "args": [{"ref": "m"}, {"lit": 1}]}, {"ref": "n"}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "sub_nonneg", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "a", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "b", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "q", "force": "demand", "quote": "For all numbers a and b", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b"]}}, {"id": "c", "force": "demand", "quote": "a minus b is greater than or equal to 0", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "<=", "args": [{"lit": 0}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_add", "statements": [{"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "quant", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "d"]}}, {"id": "hyp_da", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "d divides a", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]}}}, {"id": "hyp_db", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "d divides b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "d divides the sum a plus b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"op": "+", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}

{"theorem": "dvd_sub", "statements": [{"id": "amb", "force": "choice", "quote": "", "lf": {"kind": "ambient", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_a", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "a", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_b", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "b", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "obj_d", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "object", "name": "d", "type": "Int"}}, {"id": "allbind", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "a, b, and d are integers", "lf": {"kind": "quantifier", "binder": "forall", "objects": ["a", "b", "d"]}}, {"id": "op_dvd", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "divides", "lf": {"kind": "operator", "word": "dvd", "carrier": "Int"}}, {"id": "hyp_da", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "d divides a", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "a"}]}}}, {"id": "hyp_db", "force": "presupposition", "quote": "d divides b", "lf": {"kind": "hypothesis", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"ref": "b"}]}}}, {"id": "concl", "force": "demand", "quote": "d divides the difference a minus b", "lf": {"kind": "conclusion", "pred": {"op": "dvd", "args": [{"ref": "d"}, {"op": "-", "args": [{"ref": "a"}, {"ref": "b"}]}]}}}]}
